prompt:
Edit this existing Tektologiya diagram into a stricter curved-band conceptual plate while preserving the exact wording of every stage label and the same five-stage sequence. Treat the current image as the baseline for tone, label fidelity, and overall restraint, but change the composition so the sequence reads as a genuine arc rather than a horizontal chevron chain.

Required content, in exact order and exact wording: organizational point of view, mechanisms, regulation, applications, polemical recap. Preserve those five labels verbatim. Do not add any title, subtitle, legend, caption, side note, explanatory sentence, decorative motto, or repeated instruction text. No invented text of any kind.

Composition requirement: form the five stages as connected curved bands or connected arc segments across a landscape frame. The overall silhouette should read as one broad arc or semi-circular sweep, not a ladder and not a row of chevrons. Each stage should still be visually distinct, but the curvature must be obvious at first glance. The final stage, polemical recap, should feel like the sharpened terminal end of the arc rather than an ordinary middle segment.

Visual direction: serious editorial infographic for an intellectual book, warm parchment ground, muted mineral palette, faded sage, oxidized teal, ochre, terracotta, dark ink lines, crisp readable typography, restrained print-like finish, no figurative icons, no corporate slide style, no glossy UI look.

Preserve what worked in the previous image: clean labels, clear stage order, strong spacing, no clutter. Change what did not: make the arc genuinely curved, remove any tendency toward straight chevron procession, and keep all text fully inside or cleanly aligned to its own segment.
label: tektologiya-volume-1-arc-curved-v2

candidate.text: a volume-1 arc diagram: point of view -> mechanisms -> regulation -> applications -> polemical recap
